objections.name: What is it? (First time)
objections.strategy: Confirm identity first, then explain briefly, redirect to scheduling
objections.response: Oh yeah - hey real quick, I'm speaking with {first_name} {last_name}, right? [wait] And you're still at {address}? [wait] Ok perfect, yeah looks like you filled this out... so it's about the cash benefit programs for folks in your age group here in {county}. My job is just to get you the info - they've got {agent_name} in your area tomorrow. Morning or afternoon work better?

objections.name: What is it? (Second time)
objections.strategy: More detail with DOB reference, still redirect
objections.response: Yeah so it's the updated 2025 cash benefit programs for your age group - I've got your date of birth here as {dob}. Basically my job is just to get you the info and they have {agent_name} out there tomorrow. Would around 10am work or would 2pm be better?

objections.name: Not interested (First time)
objections.strategy: Confirm identity, then 'we have to get the info to you anyway'
objections.response: Oh ok - hey real quick, I am speaking with {first_name} {last_name} right? [wait] And you're still at {address}? [wait] Ok yeah, that's totally fine - we just gotta get the information you requested out to ya, that's all. So {agent_name} is gonna be in your area tomorrow - morning or afternoon work better?

objections.name: Not interested (Second time)
objections.strategy: Acknowledge, remind they filled out card, ask when they're home
objections.response: I hear ya {first_name}. Look, you filled out the card so we're required to get this info to you either way - it's real quick, {agent_name} will be in and out. What time are you usually home tomorrow?

objections.name: Not interested (Third time)
objections.strategy: Last attempt - find when they're home, stay friendly
objections.response: No I totally get it. Tell you what - what time do you usually get home from work? Or are you retired? I just need to find a time when you'll be there.

objections.name: I'm busy right now
objections.response: Oh I totally get it, this'll just take 30 seconds - I just need to know if morning or afternoon works better tomorrow and I'll let you go. Which is better for ya?

objections.name: How did you get my number?
triggers: how did you get my number
how do you have my number
objections.strategy: Explain card they filled out, redirect
objections.response: Yeah so you had filled out one of those cards a little while back requesting info about the benefit programs. We're just following up on that. So they've got {agent_name} in your area tomorrow - morning or afternoon work better for you?

objections.name: Is this a scam?
objections.strategy: Light humor, reassure, no sensitive info asked, redirect
objections.response: Ha, no no I totally understand being cautious these days. I'm just calling from the benefits center here in {county} following up on the card you filled out. I'm not gonna ask for your social security or credit card or anything like that - just trying to get the info packet out to ya. Morning or afternoon tomorrow work better?

objections.name: Just send me the info / Mail it
objections.strategy: Explain needs in-person review, quick visit
objections.response: Yeah I wish I could but honestly these programs are pretty specific to your situation - age, health, all that stuff - so it really needs to be gone over in person for it to make sense. It's real quick though, {agent_name} will be in and out. Morning or afternoon tomorrow work better?

objections.name: I already have insurance
objections.strategy: Compliment, mention rates change, quick stop
objections.response: Oh nice, that's good you're covered! A lot of folks in your area actually just wanna make sure they're still getting the best deal - rates change all the time. {agent_name} is gonna be in your area tomorrow anyway - morning or afternoon work better for a quick stop?

objections.name: Need to talk to spouse/family first
objections.strategy: Ask if they're there now, otherwise schedule when both home
objections.response: Oh absolutely, are they there with you now? I can hold real quick. [if not] No problem - what time will they be home? I can call back then, or we can just schedule when both of you will be there. What time works tomorrow?

objections.name: Not feeling well / Health issue
objections.response: Oh I'm sorry to hear that {first_name}, I hope you feel better soon. When do you think you'll be back on your feet? I'll schedule {agent_name} to stop by then - would later this week work or next week?

objections.name: Call me back later
objections.response: Yeah no problem - when's a good time? I'll put you down and call you right back. What time works better, morning or afternoon?

objections.name: I'm at work
objections.strategy: Ask when they get off, schedule for evening
objections.response: Oh gotcha, no worries. What time do you get off? I can call you back then, or we can just go ahead and schedule - what time are you usually home in the evenings?

objections.name: Wrong person / Not me
objections.strategy: Apologize, verify name, if wrong end politely
objections.response: Oh I'm sorry about that - I'm looking for {first_name} {last_name} at {address}. Is that you? [if no] My apologies, must have the wrong info. You have a great day!

objections.name: Person passed away
objections.strategy: Express sincere condolences, end call gracefully
objections.response: Oh I'm so sorry for your loss. I apologize for the call. Please take care of yourself.

fallback.strategy: If objection not recognized, acknowledge and redirect to scheduling
fallback.response: I hear ya. Tell you what - {agent_name} is gonna be in your area tomorrow anyway. Would morning or afternoon work better for a quick stop?
